## What changed

<!-- One sentence: what this PR does and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs / task — documentation or task lifecycle only
- [ ] chore — tooling, config, deps

## Testing

- [ ] `cd backend && mvnw.cmd test` — all pass
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm test` — all pass
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build` — no errors
- [ ] Manual smoke: golden path works, no obvious regressions

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` prepended (skip for docs-only)
- [ ] API spec updated if endpoint contract changed (`docs/09-api-spec/`)
- [ ] `.http` smoke file updated if endpoint added or changed (`docs/06-http/`)
- [ ] Task doc archived if this closes an active task (`docs/08-tasks/`)
- [ ] No unrelated files staged

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, known gaps. Delete if empty. -->
